svg.text: Chemical main effect + conditional residual + optional rule correction + AD / uncertainty / SSD
正式论文图，字体规则：中文黑体，英文 Arial，不使用字体回退
context embedding with structured endpoint coding
train space and report space separated
reported back in original factor space
user selects chemical + medium + endpoint family
EC / LC / ICx can specify effect_level
BCF / BAF do not specify effect_level
filter by user-specified historical task R2 threshold
fit SSD and report HC5 / HC10 / uncertainty
do not mix ECx, NOEC, LOEC into one SSD
说明：本图服务于统一多任务残差 QSAR 的正式论文表达，所有后续图件应在同一架构与字体规范下生成。
